description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wardrobe with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a combination of open shelving and a large sliding door. The left side consists of five open shelves, ideal for storing folded clothes or accessories, while the right side is dominated by a smooth, flat panel that appears to be a sliding door. The sliding door includes a large mirror panel, adding both functionality and visual space to the unit. The exterior is finished in a light gray or white color, with clean, sharp edges and a smooth surface. The wardrobe is constructed primarily from engineered wood or laminate, with a glass mirror integrated into the door. There are no visible handles, suggesting a recessed or push-to-open mechanism for the sliding door.
description: A modern, tall wardrobe with open shelves on one side and a mirrored sliding door on the other, finished in light gray or white with a sleek, minimalist look.
description_view_0: Front view showing five open shelves on the left and a large mirrored sliding door on the right.
description_view_1: Side view showing the wardrobe's depth and plain, flat side panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned back panel with a uniform finish.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the wardrobe's depth and plain side panel.
